title: Argentinian Beef Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy stir fry from Argentina, featuring tender beef and crunchy vegetables. This dish is perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: crunchy vegetable mix
ingredients.notes: such as carrots, zucchini, and snap peas

ingredients.name: stir-fry oil
ingredients.notes: such as vegetable or peanut oil

instructions: Heat the stir-fry oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the beef from the skillet and set aside.
Add the onion and bell pepper to the skillet and cook until tender, about 4-5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Return the beef to the skillet and add the soy sauce.
Stir in the crunchy vegetable mix and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
